name: Lentil Salad (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Steamed green beans, finely cut
recipeInstructions:
1. In a salad bowl, mix cooked lentils, celery, green beans, and parsley.
2. Prepare the dressing by combining 1 teaspoon Mild prepared mustard, salt and pepper to taste, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1/2 cup reduced-fat Italian dressing, 1 ripe tomato cut into wedges, 1/4 cup finely chopped chives, and 1 small head of shredded lettuce in a small bowl.
3. Toss the lentil mixture with the dressing and serve on the shredded lettuce. Garnish with tomato wedges and chives.
4. Serve with crusty whole wheat bread.
Total Calories Per Serving: 149
Fat: 3 grams
